overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist walking through a historical Middle Eastern city. The character moves through covered arcades, narrow streets, and open plazas with fountains, surrounded by NPCs in period clothing. The environment features sandstone architecture, palm trees, and market stalls under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market arcade transitioning to fountain courtyard

events.description: exits covered arcade with stone arches into open courtyard with central fountain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway toward the open courtyard, passing children on the right

notable_agents.action: child in dark robe walking alongside the path
seated figure resting near the stone arches

entered.detail: series of rounded stone arches forming the covered walkway with columns
large green and blue fabric canopy stretched overhead providing shade
multi-tiered circular stone fountain with water flowing
tan stone buildings with wooden doors and small windows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered stone arcade with rounded arches on the left and fabric awnings overhead. The character walks forward, transitioning into an open courtyard featuring a central stone fountain. The lighting shifts from diffused shade to bright sunlight as the character emerges from the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow residential street with overhanging rope structures

events.description: large tree branch with yellow leaves temporarily blocks upper portion of view
street opens slightly with more sky visible between buildings

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the narrow street, navigating between pedestrians walking in opposite direction

notable_agents.action: woman in dark robe walking directly toward camera before passing by
seated person resting against building wall in the shade

entered.detail: wooden lift platform suspended by ropes across the street between buildings
decorative wooden trellis with climbing vines attached to building
vertical red fabric banner hanging from building facade

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow enclosed street lined with sandstone buildings on both sides. A wooden platform hangs suspended by ropes across the street overhead. The environment is sunlit with scattered NPCs walking in opposing directions, and the street gradually opens up toward the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: market street with vendor stalls approaching main plaza

events.description: street widens revealing large domed building with minaret in the distance
character navigates around group of NPCs and a donkey carrying goods

agents.ego_description: walking through the market street, passing vendors and shoppers while approaching the domed building

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside wooden market stall displaying clay pottery
donkey being led through the street carrying bundled goods

entered.detail: market stall with white fabric canopy and large clay pots displayed
prominent building with white dome and tall cylindrical minaret
tall palm trees with green fronds lining the street edge
blue canopy providing shade over outdoor seating area

segments.scene_description: The street widens into a bustling market area with wooden stalls and palm trees lining the path. A large domed building with a minaret becomes visible in the distance. The character navigates through moderate crowds including a vendor with pottery and a donkey carrying goods.

scene_state.functional_zone: central town square with ornate fountain

events.description: enters large open plaza with central fountain and patterned stone pavement
character turns left to walk around the central fountain

agents.ego_description: entering the main plaza and walking around the central fountain, observing the surroundings and other NPCs

notable_agents.action: group of robed figures standing and conversing near the fountain edge
man in yellow turban and beard walking past camera

entered.detail: large ornate stone fountain with multiple tiers and water basins
decorative geometric stone tile work covering the plaza ground
stone seating arranged around the plaza perimeter
raised garden beds with pink flowering plants

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious open plaza featuring an ornate central fountain and decorative patterned pavement. Groups of NPCs gather around the fountain and walk across the square. The large domed building shifts to the right as the character circles the fountain, passing flower beds and stone benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden terrace with shaded seating and stone steps

events.description: character ascends wide stone steps leading to upper garden terrace

agents.ego_description: walking up stone steps into a garden terrace area, passing under shaded awnings and trellises

notable_agents.action: woman in purple robe standing near the base of the steps
figure in green robe tending to garden plants near trellis

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with multiple steps leading upward
large blue fabric canopy stretched between poles providing shade
wooden seating arranged under the shade structure
wooden framework with climbing vines and plants

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the plaza and enters a garden terrace area featuring wide stone steps leading upward. Blue fabric shade sails provide cover over wooden benches, while trellises with climbing vines line the path. The environment is quieter with fewer NPCs present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the cool shade of a covered arcade into the bright, bustling expanse of a city market. It begins within a stone walkway of rounded arches and fabric awnings, moving forward as the lighting shifts from diffused shade to brilliant sunlight upon emerging into an open courtyard with a central stone fountain. The camera then follows the character into a narrow, sun-drenched street lined with sandstone buildings, passing beneath a wooden platform suspended by ropes. As the enclosed path gradually widens, the scene opens into a vibrant market area filled with wooden stalls, palm trees, and crowds of NPCs. The movement finally leads toward a distant domed building and minaret, passing a pottery vendor and a donkey carrying goods.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling public plaza into a secluded, shaded garden terrace. It begins in a spacious open square, circling an ornate central fountain and decorative patterned pavement while groups of NPCs gather nearby. As the character moves past flower beds and stone benches, a large domed building shifts to the right, guiding the path away from the crowd. The scene then transitions from the open plaza into a quieter terrace area, where the camera ascends wide stone steps. Finally, the environment opens into a serene space defined by climbing vines on trellises and blue fabric shade sails stretching over wooden benches.
